reviews.review_text:
We were waiting at the door of the office for 40minutes waiting for someone to see us. (We just left after 40 minutes)
Extremely poor management and organisation.

We owned a cabin here for several years. It's a nice and quiet park, with plenty of space. You aren't on top of each other like the parks closer to the beaches. Family owned and managed, they are awesome to deal with and very helpful. We have had many great times here. Highly recommend.

weekend well spent!! had great facilities great customer service and great scenory atrractions would definetley reccomend staying here with this park being only 5 minutes from town very happy with my stay 👍🏽
Lovely and quiet. Enjoyed my stay.

I recently stayed at Batman's bay north tourist park , I had an immaculate stay the service was amazing at the front office they fulfilled all of my needs during my stay. This park is close to some amazing beaches and close to the town. The pool area was so beautiful and the pool was extremely clean and refreshing, I stayed in the bay north bush cottages and  i would highly recommend staying in them. they were clean and smelt amazing and had everything i needed , And a bonus the beds were extra comfy ! . Defiantly book 10/10 stay.

THIS LINK TAKES YOU STRAIGHT TO BOOK THEM.  :) :)

https://www.airbnb.com.au/rooms/998856643105043287?_set_bev_on_new_domain=1701654645_NjQzMzRiYzJlNGQ1&source_impression_id=p3_1701654656_QUPLE9fJMuVuYjJv

Recently stayed at the park and had a great experience. Park was nice and quiet and peaceful, enjoyed staying in the beautiful new Accommodation. Management was very helpful and professional. Would highly recommend. Definitely be back.
